hypotheses.H1: Pythia-410m (RoPE/NeoX) W_QK r-ratio ≈ 0.536 (GOE-like) across all heads
hypotheses.H2: Pythia-410m r-ratio within 0.02 of GPT-2 baseline (architecture-independent)
hypotheses.H3: GPT-2-medium r-ratio within 0.02 of GPT-2 (scale-invariant within family)
hypotheses.H0: GOE was GPT-2-specific; other models show Poisson or weaker pattern

protocol.r_ratio: Oganesyan-Huse r-ratio on sorted eigenvalue spacings
